description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 48 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 6 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Other, Java, and Markdown. The activity data shows 6 projects, but no public repository names or commits were recorded.
